life_paths.title: The Leader
life_paths.love: Needs space and independence. Attracts strong, admiring partners.
life_paths.career: Natural entrepreneur or pioneer. Excels in leadership roles.
life_paths.2026_outlook: A year for starting new solo ventures and taking full control of your destiny.

life_paths.title: The Diplomat
life_paths.love: Nurturing and supportive partner. Seeks deep emotional connection.
life_paths.career: Excellent mediator, counselor, or diplomat. Thrives in partnerships.
life_paths.2026_outlook: Focus on strengthening partnerships and resolving long-standing conflicts.

life_paths.title: The Creative
life_paths.love: Playful and social. Needs a partner who appreciates creativity.
life_paths.career: Artist, communicator, or entertainer. Success through expression.
life_paths.2026_outlook: A massive year for creative breakthroughs and public self-expression.

life_paths.title: The Builder
life_paths.love: Loyal and reliable. Builds relationships on a solid foundation.
life_paths.career: Manager, builder, or organizer. Excels in structured environments.
life_paths.2026_outlook: Year of financial consolidation and building a permanent home/base.

life_paths.title: The Adventurer
life_paths.love: Exciting and passionate, but can be restless. Needs variety.
life_paths.career: Traveler, marketer, or freelancer. Thrives in changing environments.
life_paths.2026_outlook: High energy for travel, exploration, and radical lifestyle changes.

life_paths.title: The Nurturer
life_paths.love: Deeply devoted and protective. The 'parent' of the group.
life_paths.career: Teacher, healer, or community leader. Success through service.
life_paths.2026_outlook: Focus on domestic harmony, community building, and healing others.

life_paths.title: The Seeker
life_paths.love: Seeks deep, spiritual bonds. Can be private and reserved.
life_paths.career: Researcher, philosopher, or spiritual teacher. Needs quiet focus.
life_paths.2026_outlook: A year of profound spiritual realizations and solitude for study.

life_paths.title: The Achiever
life_paths.love: Attracted to power and success. Wants a 'power couple' dynamic.
life_paths.career: CEO, investor, or entrepreneur. Focused on material success.
life_paths.2026_outlook: Massive financial expansion and assuming positions of high authority.

life_paths.title: The Humanitarian
life_paths.love: Loves universally. Needs a partner who shares their ideals.
life_paths.career: Activist, artist, or spiritual guide. Focused on global impact.
life_paths.challenge: Difficulty letting go and feelings of martyrdom.
life_paths.2026_outlook: Completing major humanitarian projects and preparing for a new life phase.
